overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character walking through a foggy, desolate grassland with tall brown grass and scattered trees. An elk crosses the path midway through, and the character approaches a distant rocky outcrop with Nordic-style wooden structures. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy open grassland with scattered pine trees

events.description: large elk emerges from the left side of the tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall brown grass toward distant rocky formations

notable_agents.action: elk with large antlers standing in the grass watching the character approach

entered.detail: dense field of tall brown and tan grass swaying in the wind
tall thin pine trees scattered across the rolling hills in the mist
large rocky mountain formation with ruins visible on the slope
decaying fallen tree trunk lying in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast foggy grassland with tall brown grass swaying in the wind. Scattered pine trees dot the rolling hills in the distance, while a large rocky outcrop looms ahead in the mist. An elk emerges from the left side of the frame, standing alert in the tall grass as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path cutting through grassland approaching rocky hills

events.description: elk crosses from left to right across the path in front of the character
ground surface transitions from pure grass to mixed dirt trail with rocks

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path as the elk crosses

notable_agents.action: elk with large antlers crossing the dirt path from left to right

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail cutting through the tall grass with scattered stones
traditional wooden building with pointed roof and ornate carvings on the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: The elk crosses the path from left to right, passing close to the character before moving into the grass. The ground transitions to a dirt trail with scattered rocks as the character continues forward. A wooden Nordic-style structure becomes visible atop the rocky hillside ahead, while the pine trees recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside approach with ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: walking up the gradual slope toward the wooden structure on the hill

entered.detail: ancient stone wall ruins partially covered in grass and moss

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dirt path up the gradual slope, approaching the wooden structure that now dominates the center of the view. The rocky outcrop shifts to the left as the path curves, revealing ancient stone ruins partially buried in the grass. The tall grass continues to surround the path as the character nears the destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, foggy grassland that gradually leads toward a rocky hillside topped with ancient structures. It begins with the character walking through vast fields of swaying brown grass and scattered pine trees, where an alert elk emerges from the mist on the left. As the elk crosses the path and disappears into the brush, the terrain shifts from wild grassland to a rocky dirt trail. The scene then opens up as the character ascends a gradual slope, with the pine trees receding and a Nordic-style wooden structure becoming the central focus atop the hill. Finally, the path curves to the left, passing partially buried stone ruins before the character reaches the destination.
